items.name: The Abyssal Pincer
items.tooltip:
The Abyssal Pincer
Binds when picked up
Unique
Main HandFist Weapon
87 - 163 DamageSpeed 2.60
(48.1 damage per second)
+5 Stamina
+4 Strength
Durability 75 / 75
Requires Level 60
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike by 1%.
Chance on hit: Blasts the target for 120 Frost damage, reducing movement speed by 20% for 2 seconds.

(62.6 damage per second)
+23 Stamina
Durability 120 / 120
Requires Level 60
Equip: +36 Attack Power.
Equip: Improves your chance to hit by 2%.
Equip: Your landing ranged and melee attacks have a 5% chance to increase your Agility by 75 for 10 sec.

items.name: Sphere of the Endless Gulch
items.tooltip:
Sphere of the Endless Gulch
Binds when picked up
Unique
Trinket
Requires Level 60
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 30.
Equip: Gives a 20% chance when your harmful spells land to grant you Wisdom of the Mak'aru. Upon gaining Wisdom of the Mak'aru 20 times, you enter an enlightened state, increasing casting speed by 20% for 12 sec.

items.name: Anchor of the Wavecutter
items.tooltip:

Binds when picked up
Unique
Two-handMace
182 - 269 DamageSpeed 3.60
(62.6 damage per second)
+13 Strength
+11 Intellect
Durability 120 / 120
Requires Level 60
Equip: Improves your chance to hit by 1%.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 32.
Chance on hit: Inflicts 200 Frost damage to enemies in a cone in front of you, reducing movement speed by 20% for 5 seconds.
"The anchor of Daelin Proudmoore's flagship, now infused by the essence of the Abyssal Pincer."
